2023-24 Central Arkansas Bears Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 9-23 (5-11, 10th in A-Sun MBB)

Coach: Anthony Boone

PS/G: 72.2 (220th of 362)

PA/G: 78.2 (330th of 362)

SRS: -15.70 (340th of 362)

SOS: -5.64 (298th of 362)

ORtg: 101.7 (280th of 362)

DRtg: 110.1 (328th of 362)
